matchRules.title: Match rules
matchRules.selectLeague: Select a league to configure match rules.

seasons.noLeague: No league selected. Choose a league from the selector or open a league from the list.
seasons.empty: No seasons yet. Create one to get started.

divisions.noLeague: No league selected. Choose a league from the selector or open a league from the list.
divisions.empty: No divisions yet. Create one to get started.

divisionRules.title: Division match & scheduling rules
divisionRules.inheritanceInfo: Values inherit from league match rules when left empty. Field allow-list uses division_season_fields only.
divisionRules.fieldsAll: Fields: all league fields (no explicit allow-list)
divisionRules.overridesInfo: Save sends explicit numbers/JSON; use “Clear division row” to fall back fully to globals.
divisionRules.explicitFieldsInfo: When any fields are selected, auto scheduling only uses these fields.
divisionRules.breakBetween: Break between matches on same field (minutes)
divisionRules.timeRangesHelp: Only kickoffs within these windows are allowed for this division. Leave empty to inherit league defaults.
divisionRules.invalidRangeHint: Each window must end after it starts. Fix or remove the invalid row.
